items.title: Analysts and researchers say Google's TurboQuant compression algorithm to make LLMs more efficient is more likely to expand memory chip demand than reduce it (Daniel Tudor/Financial Times)
items.title_original: Analysts and researchers say Google's TurboQuant compression algorithm to make LLMs more efficient is more likely to expand memory chip demand than reduce it (Daniel Tudor/Financial Times)
items.title_en: Analysts and researchers say Google's TurboQuant compression algorithm to make LLMs more efficient is more likely to expand memory chip demand than reduce it (Daniel Tudor/Financial Times)
items.title_zh: 分析师和研究人员表示，谷歌的 TurboQuant 压缩算法可以提高法学硕士的效率，这更有可能扩大内存芯片的需求，而不是减少内存芯片的需求（Daniel Tudor/金融时报）
items.title_bilingual: 分析师和研究人员表示，谷歌的 TurboQuant 压缩算法可以提高法学硕士的效率，这更有可能扩大内存芯片的需求，而不是减少内存芯片的需求（Daniel Tudor/金融时报） / Analysts and researchers say Google's TurboQuant compression algorithm to make LLMs more efficient is more likely to expand memory chip demand than reduce it (Daniel Tudor/Financial Times)
